items.title: NHTSA denies Tesla door-release defect petition, opens new door rules
items.body: NHTSA has denied a petition asking it to open a defect investigation into the hidden manual door releases on the Tesla Model 3. But in the same decision, the agency agreed to start writing new door-safety rules for the e…
